package rulecoverage

func NegativeMisgroupedImports() string {
    ruleID := "misgrouped_imports"
    family := "style"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Import blocks that place stdlib imports after third-party imports."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
